authority: CIS-EX-008 proposed protocol; not authorized for collection

scope.population: population pending methods and accessibility review

prohibited_interpretations: Exposure or signaling does not establish perception, understanding, usability, or accessibility.
mapping_rule: Preserve target state and operation semantics; expose the target operation and render one declared signifier adjacent to its control.
interpretation_assumptions: The signifier label is understandable only within the reviewed participant and task scope.
observer_class: reviewed study participants after standardized training
intended_use: test the effect of declared signaling while holding target semantics and exposed operations constant
failure_conditions: Target or recovery operation differs between conditions.
Measured feedback latency exceeds the preregistered equivalence bound.
The target signifier is absent or appears in the unsignaled condition.
